item.title: Cartoon Cosplays from Kamii Momoru
item.description:
Peach, Daisy, and Rosalina try out Spider-Gwen, Spider-Woman, and Silk outfits. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1720517306688655667
Cammy White is going to kick ass in her Barbie outfit! Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1684263462061342723
Pomni is a little nervous in her Classic Harley outfit. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1718339365837947199
Purah helped dress up Wall-E to look like her favorite little adventurer. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1658244458737987585
Daisy looks great in her Zero Suit, right?? Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1522289057333755904
Mordecai and Rigby are ready for adventure! Source: https://x.com/Kamii_momoru/status/1497719723366125568 All art is by Kamii Momoru: https://www.instagram.com/momoru_kamii/ - - - - - I saw that this artist had a lot of characters in cosplay, so I figured I'd share! What's a character swap cosplay you'd like to see??
item.dc:creator: Bjr4life

item.dc:creator: Odoyyoxigoyxc

item.title: Unholy Sunday Stolen Dump of Chaotic Memes
item.description:
1. It's going well, I can see
2. The best defense is offense
3. Haters will say this is faked in some way
4. Customer service
5. Yeah, what's up with that?!
6
7. The Grindset is strong here
8. As it was written
9. A happy man
10. What genre would give up to live in a mansion? (Also I'm picturing FBI agent being on you 24/7 and the moment you decided to listen to rap, they kick you out of the mansion)
11. Excuse me sir, but you're in my seat
12. That's how he sleeps
13. Rump shaker
14. To everyone who scrolled trough this dump, you deserve the clapping seal gang
15. And finally I would like to share with you some footage of a wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game that I'm currently developing. If you liked the humor in this dump, I'm pretty sure the game is for you! Here as a full novel that I put in the game that I got a ghost writer to write. It will change the way you look at life and your inner self! Anyway, please wishlist, as small indie devs can't do it without good natured people like you: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: 22 memes
item.description: Hello lovely people. we are looking for friends for a dnd server. We have plenty of DMs working together on multiple stories and a lot of games from one shots, giant encounters to longer campaigns. We have a tavern for RP, memes and art. https://discord.gg/z89kqcRg

item.title: Get to know your neighbors
item.description:
Some neighbors are the best, some aren't. You'll never know till you get to know them.
I, myself, have wonderful neighbors and we all look out for each other. I would trust any of them to watch my son if I had to and that is a reassuring feeling.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: This is all DEFINITELY Jen’s fault…
item.dc:creator: superanth

item.title: Love this outfit, and her message!
item.description:
This is Yasmin Benoit.
She identifies as goth and asexual.
When people think of "goth girls" or "goth boys", it's usually a milky pale person. Yasmin wants the world to remember that people of all races love the deep, dark intensity of goth culture. Have a read of this great op-ed she wrote all about the subject: https://metro.co.uk/2020/05/22/goths-come-shapes-colours-12744513/ Most Viral Edit: support your local goths! Especially in this heat!
item.dc:creator: Bjr4life

item.title: A dump of older Favorites.
item.description:
Me.
But also me...
JUSTICE! (Kiki's Delivery Service, and that bitch getting served with her grandma's herring pie.)
I love shit like this. I know it's a trick, you even get to watch them change size, and it STILL fucks with my brain.
item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs

item.title: I made a tracker for Alien RPG
item.description:
Five most comman stats and resources, plus a slider for panic level. Made from acrylic, some pla parts, magnets, and a steel rod.
Fits normal size IDs through a slot in the top and has a hook for a lanyard
Here's how it slides in
Swappable dials!
Here was my first draft. I'll probably return and make this again but fix some things I addressed with Big Chap above. I like the small format of this one and it uses less materials overall - would be good to offer both.
item.dc:creator: Frostycopper

item.title: When laptops were the entire lap
item.description: Sony SMC-2100L6 M35, 1986 CPU 80C88 4.77MHz, RAM 640KB, 2x720KB floppy drives, non-backlit 11" LCD CGA 640x200 dots, modem 300 bps Weight: 13 lbs

item.title: Extreme Meme Storage Dump
item.dc:creator: Neiot

item.title: I'm feeling powerless. I doubt this'll change anyone's mind. Maybe it changes just one?
item.description: It'll get down voted. At least I tried Edit: holy shit, I honestly thought this was going to die in usersub. Please go vote. Make sure everyone you know understands the impact it'll have on you. Accept that there are going to be uncomfortable conversations and a loss of friends and family. While I encourage you to keep fighting, have an exit strategy set up. Things won't go holocaust overnight. But it will inevitably go that way. Make sure you aren't caught off guard when it does.
item.dc:creator: Wrongclusterbdisorderbutgooff

item.title: Consider this dump cursed.
item.dc:creator: StigoftheDumps

item.title: How a backdraft happens.
item.description: A backdraft can happen when a house is on fire and most of the oxygen inside has been used up, causing the fire to smolder and produce a lot of smoke and flammable gases. If someone opens a door or window, fresh air rushes in, mixing with these gases and causing a sudden explosion of flames. Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C9koqNSMlkJ
item.dc:creator: BluesFish

item.title: It's so tiny!
